context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the plan-tests instructions from the published Rails Agent Skills tile.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Use this skill when the hardest part of the task is deciding where TDD should start.

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Pick the smallest strong slice:** Choose the spec type that proves the behavior without dragging in unrelated layers. Do not choose the first spec based on convenience alone — do not start with a lower-level unit if the real risk is request, job, engine, or persistence wiring.

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Write one failing example:** Keep it minimal; one example is enough to open the gate.

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Run and validate:** Confirm the failure is because the behavior is missing, not because the setup is broken.

checklist.name: instruction-5
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: CHECKPOINT: Test Design Review
